trim.if: and a.store_id = #{store_id} and b.recycle = 0 and c.status = 2

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_distribution_goods as a left join lkt_configure as b on a.s_id = b.id left join lkt_product_list as c on a.p_id = c.id left join lkt_mch as m on c.mch_id = m.id
mapper.sql:
and b.store_id = #{store_id} AND b. STATUS = 2 and a.recycle = 0 and b.recycle= 0
and d.id=#{mchId} and b.commodity_type = #{commodity_type} and b.product_title like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%')
and b.product_class like concat('%-',#{goodsClass},'-%')
and b.is_presell = #{isPresell} and (b.gongyingshang = '' or b.gongyingshang is null) and d.name like concat('%',#{mchName},'%') and not exists(select id from lkt_distribution_goods as c where a.id = c.s_id and recycle = 0)
mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_configure as a left join lkt_product_list as b on a.pid = b.id left join lkt_mch as d on b.mch_id = d.id

select a.*, d.price, d.costprice from lkt_distribution_goods a left join lkt_order_details b on a.s_id=b.sid left join lkt_order c on b.r_sNo = c.sNo left join lkt_configure d on a.s_id = d.id where a.store_id = #{store_id} and c.sno=#{sno} and a.recycle = 0
